learn.core_idea: Reads require translating logical offsets through file metadata to physical block mappings.
mechanism_steps: Map logical blocks to physical storage blocks.
learn.worked_example: Trace shows fs.path then fs.blockmap as read length increases.
common_mistakes: Checking only syscall return without trace evidence.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can relate mapping to read size.
I can verify path resolution first.
